Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction.

The Court's tentative ruling was as follows: hearing required regarding status of service of temporary restraining order and OSC re preliminary injunction on defendant.

The matter is called. No appearances by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the Court orders the matter off calendar.
